name: Highwaymen Motorcycle Club
description: The Highwaymen Motorcycle Club is a one-percenter outlaw motorcycle club founded in Detroit, Michigan in 1954. It is the largest motorcycle club in the Detroit area with over 400 members and chapters in several U.S. states. The club has been the subject of major FBI investigations in 1973, 1987, and 2007, resulting in convictions for racketeering, drug trafficking, and other crimes.
